title: Mail Merge
excerpt:
Hi there, 
Could someone please advise how I send the same email to a large quantity of contacts I have stored on Mondays? 
I need this email to be personalised, to include a form & links 
Any help would be greatly appre…

posts.author: OrlaSheehan (Orla Sheehan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

Could someone please advise how I send the same email to a large quantity of contacts I have stored on Mondays?
I need this email to be personalised, to include a form & links

Any help would be greatly appreciated

Thank you

Orla

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!
To send a bulk email, you can use Mailchimp.com. First, create a separate task for sending the email, and then create a trigger button in a separate column.

When personalizing the email, you can make it more engaging by placing the link and forms in separate columns. This will allow you to easily pull them into the Mailchimp emails.

In case you need any help setting it up let me know here and I’ll be happy to assist.

Zaki

Business Workflow Consultant

Ready Logic

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @OrlaSheehan

Using an intuitive email-to-board template in monday.com is an effective way to send personalized emails to multiple accounts. With this template, you can integrate both Gmail and Outlook accounts. Besides, the referencing tab in this template enables you to add custom forms and links with email content with ease.

Our seasoned monday.com consultants can efficiently configure and deploy the email-to-board template according to your preferences.
